stemHtml: Which of the following options contains the correct frequency band, propagation path and frequency range for radio communications using a single side band?

options.b: MF, 190 KHz to 1750 KHz, surface and sky waves.
options.c: HF, 3 MHz to 30 MHz, surface and sky waves.
options.d: HF, 3 MHz to 30 MHz, surface waves only.
